metadata.name: Manage a Server Firewall
metadata.description: Configure firewall rules to control access to services
objectives: Configure firewall rules to control access to services

tasks.name: Verify httpd package is installed
tasks.description: The httpd package provides the Apache web server
tasks.failure_message: The httpd package is not installed
hints: Install the httpd package: sudo dnf install httpd

tasks.name: Verify mod_ssl package is installed
tasks.description: The mod_ssl package enables SSL/TLS support for Apache
tasks.failure_message: The mod_ssl package is not installed
hints: Install the mod_ssl package: sudo dnf install mod_ssl

tasks.name: Verify index.html exists with correct content
tasks.description: The web server should serve custom content from /var/www/html/index.html
tasks.success_message: The index.html file exists with correct content
tasks.failure_message: The index.html file is missing or has incorrect content
hints: Create the file: echo 'I am servera.' > /var/www/html/index.html

tasks.name: Verify httpd service is running
tasks.description: The httpd service must be active to serve web content
tasks.failure_message: The httpd service is not running
hints: Start the service: sudo systemctl start httpd

tasks.name: Verify httpd service is enabled at boot
tasks.description: The httpd service should start automatically at boot
tasks.success_message: The httpd service is enabled at boot
tasks.failure_message: The httpd service is not enabled at boot
hints: Enable the service: sudo systemctl enable httpd
Or enable and start: sudo systemctl enable --now httpd

tasks.name: Verify firewalld service is running
tasks.description: The firewalld service must be running to manage firewall rules
tasks.failure_message: The firewalld service is not running
hints: Start firewalld: sudo systemctl start firewalld

tasks.name: Verify https service is allowed in firewall
tasks.description: The firewall must allow HTTPS traffic (443/tcp) for secure web access

checks.description: Check https service is in the permanent firewall configuration

tasks.success_message: The https service is allowed in the firewall
tasks.failure_message: The https service is not allowed in the firewall

tasks.name: Verify web server is accessible over HTTPS
tasks.description: The web content should be accessible via HTTPS from external hosts
tasks.success_message: The web server is accessible over HTTPS
tasks.failure_message: The web server is not accessible over HTTPS
hints: Check httpd is running: systemctl status httpd
